# Quantize per channel while transposing tiles

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_deepseek_manual.py; do not edit. -->

This quantization translation derives scaling factors and converted values without scalar tensor loops.

## Core C++ kernel

```cpp title="per_channel_cast_and_transpose_pto.hpp" linenums="1"
void per_channel_cast_and_transpose(InDType *x, OutDType *out,
                                    float *out_sf, float max_val,
                                    float clamp_min) {
    static_assert(NumTokens % 128 == 0, "source requires token count multiple of 128");
    static_assert(Hidden % 64 == 0, "source requires hidden multiple of 64");
    static_assert(NumPerTokens == 32 || NumPerTokens == 128,
                  "source supports 32 or 128 tokens per scale");
    static_assert(TileTokens % NumPerTokens == 0,
                  "tile token count must cover whole scale groups");
    static_assert(TileTokens * TileHidden * static_cast<int>(sizeof(InDType)) >= 128,
                  "thread-local input fragment must be at least 128 bytes");

    constexpr int kTM = NumTokens / TileTokens;
    constexpr int kTK = Hidden / TileHidden;
    constexpr int kScaleRowsPerTile = TileTokens / NumPerTokens;
    using namespace pto;
    using gm_x = global_tensor<InDType, RowMajor<NumTokens, Hidden>>;
    using gm_o = global_tensor<OutDType, RowMajor<Hidden, NumTokens>>;
    using gm_sf = global_tensor<float, RowMajor<NumTokens / NumPerTokens, Hidden>>;
    using tile_x = LocalTile< InDType, TileTokens, TileHidden,
                        BLayout::RowMajor>;
    using tile_t = LocalTile< InDType, TileHidden, TileTokens,
                        BLayout::RowMajor>;
    using tile_tf = LocalTile< float, TileHidden, TileTokens,
                         BLayout::RowMajor>;
    using tile_o = LocalTile< OutDType, TileHidden, TileTokens,
                        BLayout::RowMajor>;
    using tile_sf = LocalTile< float, TileHidden, 8, BLayout::RowMajor,
                         TileHidden, 1>;
    using it_x = global_iterator<gm_x, tile_x>;
    using it_o = global_iterator<gm_o, tile_o>;
    using it_sf = global_iterator<gm_sf, tile_sf>;
    it_x x_iter(x);
    it_o o_iter(out);
    it_sf sf_iter(out_sf);

    for (int tm = 0; tm < kTM; ++tm) {
        for (int tk = 0; tk < kTK; ++tk) {
            auto gx = x_iter(tm, tk);
            auto go = o_iter(tk, tm);
            tile_x src;
            tile_t transposed;
            tile_tf tf, neg, scaled, inv_full;
            tile_o oq;
            TLOAD(src, gx);
            TTRANS(transposed, src);
            TCVT(tf, transposed);
            TMULS(neg, tf, -1.0f);
            for (int sg = 0; sg < kScaleRowsPerTile; ++sg) {
                (void)sg;
            }
            tile_sf pos, negm, amax, sf, inv;
            TROWMAX(pos, tf);
            TROWMAX(negm, neg);
            TMAX(amax, pos, negm);
            TMAXS(amax, amax, clamp_min);
            TMULS(sf, amax, 1.0f / max_val);
            TRECIP(inv, amax);
            TMULS(inv, inv, max_val);
            TROWEXPAND(inv_full, inv);
            TMUL(scaled, tf, inv_full);
            TCVT(oq, scaled);
            auto gsf = sf_iter(tm * kScaleRowsPerTile, tk);
            TSTORE(gsf, sf);
            TSTORE(go, oq);
        }
    }
}
```

## Algorithm walkthrough

Load an activation fragment, compute an absolute maximum with tile reductions, derive the scale, convert the valid values, and store data and scale tiles.

## Source-to-intrinsic mapping

[`TCVT`](../../../intrinsics/tcvt.md), [`TLOAD`](../../../intrinsics/tload.md), [`TMAX`](../../../intrinsics/tmax.md), [`TMAXS`](../../../intrinsics/tmaxs.md), [`TMUL`](../../../intrinsics/tmul.md), [`TMULS`](../../../intrinsics/tmuls.md), [`TRECIP`](../../../intrinsics/trecip.md), [`TROWEXPAND`](../../../intrinsics/trowexpand.md), [`TROWMAX`](../../../intrinsics/trowmax.md), [`TSTORE`](../../../intrinsics/tstore.md), [`TTRANS`](../../../intrinsics/ttrans.md)

Scalar C++ controls dimensions, loop bounds, and tile coordinates. Tensor
values remain in global tensor views and typed tiles throughout the data path.

## Block and thread partition

Blocks partition outer rows; threads own non-overlapping token, channel, or block fragments whose valid payload is at least 128 bytes.

## Memory and tile flow

Activation tiles are converted to the accumulation type, reduced for scale calculation, transformed, converted to the output type, and stored with their scale tiles.

## Build and verification

Run the migration gate from the repository root:

```console
python3 scripts/verify_deepseek_migration.py
```

The verification label records the strongest completed gate. A
`source-validated` page is a valid API example even when compiler lowering
for one of its public intrinsics is not yet available.

## Complete translated source

??? code "per_channel_cast_and_transpose_pto.hpp"

    ```cpp title="per_channel_cast_and_transpose_pto.hpp" linenums="1"
    #ifndef SUPERNPU_PER_CHANNEL_CAST_AND_TRANSPOSE_PTO_HPP
    #define SUPERNPU_PER_CHANNEL_CAST_AND_TRANSPOSE_PTO_HPP

    #include <common/pto_tileop.hpp>
    #include <cstddef>
    #include <cstdint>

    namespace supernpu::tile_isa {

    template <typename InDType, typename OutDType, int NumTokens, int Hidden,
              int NumPerTokens = 128, int TileTokens = 128, int TileHidden = 64>
    void per_channel_cast_and_transpose(InDType *x, OutDType *out,
                                        float *out_sf, float max_val,
                                        float clamp_min) {
        static_assert(NumTokens % 128 == 0, "source requires token count multiple of 128");
        static_assert(Hidden % 64 == 0, "source requires hidden multiple of 64");
        static_assert(NumPerTokens == 32 || NumPerTokens == 128,
                      "source supports 32 or 128 tokens per scale");
        static_assert(TileTokens % NumPerTokens == 0,
                      "tile token count must cover whole scale groups");
        static_assert(TileTokens * TileHidden * static_cast<int>(sizeof(InDType)) >= 128,
                      "thread-local input fragment must be at least 128 bytes");

        constexpr int kTM = NumTokens / TileTokens;
        constexpr int kTK = Hidden / TileHidden;
        constexpr int kScaleRowsPerTile = TileTokens / NumPerTokens;
        using namespace pto;
        using gm_x = global_tensor<InDType, RowMajor<NumTokens, Hidden>>;
        using gm_o = global_tensor<OutDType, RowMajor<Hidden, NumTokens>>;
        using gm_sf = global_tensor<float, RowMajor<NumTokens / NumPerTokens, Hidden>>;
        using tile_x = LocalTile< InDType, TileTokens, TileHidden,
                            BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using tile_t = LocalTile< InDType, TileHidden, TileTokens,
                            BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using tile_tf = LocalTile< float, TileHidden, TileTokens,
                             BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using tile_o = LocalTile< OutDType, TileHidden, TileTokens,
                            BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using tile_sf = LocalTile< float, TileHidden, 8, BLayout::RowMajor,
                             TileHidden, 1>;
        using it_x = global_iterator<gm_x, tile_x>;
        using it_o = global_iterator<gm_o, tile_o>;
        using it_sf = global_iterator<gm_sf, tile_sf>;
        it_x x_iter(x);
        it_o o_iter(out);
        it_sf sf_iter(out_sf);

        for (int tm = 0; tm < kTM; ++tm) {
            for (int tk = 0; tk < kTK; ++tk) {
                auto gx = x_iter(tm, tk);
                auto go = o_iter(tk, tm);
                tile_x src;
                tile_t transposed;
                tile_tf tf, neg, scaled, inv_full;
                tile_o oq;
                TLOAD(src, gx);
                TTRANS(transposed, src);
                TCVT(tf, transposed);
                TMULS(neg, tf, -1.0f);
                for (int sg = 0; sg < kScaleRowsPerTile; ++sg) {
                    (void)sg;
                }
                tile_sf pos, negm, amax, sf, inv;
                TROWMAX(pos, tf);
                TROWMAX(negm, neg);
                TMAX(amax, pos, negm);
                TMAXS(amax, amax, clamp_min);
                TMULS(sf, amax, 1.0f / max_val);
                TRECIP(inv, amax);
                TMULS(inv, inv, max_val);
                TROWEXPAND(inv_full, inv);
                TMUL(scaled, tf, inv_full);
                TCVT(oq, scaled);
                auto gsf = sf_iter(tm * kScaleRowsPerTile, tk);
                TSTORE(gsf, sf);
                TSTORE(go, oq);
            }
        }
    }

    }

    #endif
    ```
